axiom_text: axiom (forall s: Seq, lo: int, hi: int :: { Seq#Drop(Seq#Take(s, hi + 1), lo) } 0 <= lo && lo <= hi && hi < Seq#Length(s) ==> Seq#Drop(Seq#Take(s, hi + 1), lo) == Seq#Append(Seq#Drop(Seq#Take(s, hi), lo), Seq#Build(Seq#Empty(): Seq, Seq#Index(s, hi))));

also_tested_on_without4_variant.note: Fixed invariant maintenance error; remaining 3 errors are CountBetterAppend precondition failures (separate issue, not present when lemma is removed)

notes: The axiom expresses s[lo..hi+1] == s[lo..hi] + [s[hi]], which is the fundamental slice-append decomposition identity. It triggers on Seq#Drop(Seq#Take(s, hi+1), lo) and produces the Seq#Append form that allows CountBetter to be unfolded by one step.
